summary: Phase 4 completed: F1 additional fallback tests (Execute/External/Verification layers), L1-L4 loop architecture verified, loop prevention features implemented (cumulative mistake tracking, flip-flop detection), final acceptance criteria met.

fixedIssues: MistakeTracker now tracks cumulativeMistakes across the session (not just consecutive)

Verification fallback tests: repair loop triggering, lint/typecheck as last-resort verification
